arts.ttl: The unluckiest supporters in England: Two games called off in a day for Portsmouth faithful at the hands of Storm Bert
arts.sum: It was a double dose of Saturday misery for one group of Pompey fans after BOTH matches they tried to attend were rained off.

arts.ttl: Pressure intensifies on Hull City boss and Oxford United hammered on positive Championship afternoon for Portsmouth
arts.sum: Pompey saw a broadly positive round of results unfold for them in the Championship this afternoon.

arts.ttl: 'Look out for that one' - Portsmouth exploring ways to bring essential new addition to Fratton Park that will get the faithful's automatic backing
arts.sum: Pompey are already working hard behind the scenes to bring another exciting new addition to Fratton Park.

arts.ttl: 'Never a punishment' - Blackburn Rovers message ahead of gruelling fixture run
arts.sum: John Eustace will continue to use the 21s to keep his players' tanks topped up

arts.ttl: What I’ve seen and know about Conor Shaughnessy and John Mousinho bust-up talk that's rife among Portsmouth faithful
arts.sum: The way it’s played out, it’s only natural Pompey fans would have their suspicions over Conor Shaughnessy’s latest injury setback.

arts.ttl: Highly-rated Portsmouth player completes loan move away from Fratton Park as he links up with former Fratton favourite
arts.sum: Pompey have secured another loan move for goalkeeping prospect Toby Steward.
Blackburn Rovers' head coach believes he can see progression from his side

arts.ttl: 'Absolute joke. A disgrace. Deduct them points' - Portsmouth faithful react as Blackburn Rovers game called off hours before kick-off following well-documented weather warnings
arts.sum: Pompey fans on social media have been reacting to the news that today’s game at Blackburn Rovers has been called off.

arts.ttl: Blackburn and Bradford fixtures among matches called off due to Storm Bert
arts.sum: Bradford’s League Two game against Accrington and Fleetwood’s match with MK Dons have also become victims of the weather.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Portsmouth’s Championship clash with Blackburn Rovers postponed
arts.sum: Pompey’s clash with Blackburn has been called off today.
